name: Herz der Revolution
desc: Heimat, the capital of the Nation, and 'Heart of the Revolution'. Since the fateful days of the uprising, Heimat's inhabitants have fierce pride over its role in overthrowing and eventual victory over the Empire.

name: Protektor Cadres
desc: The Nation, ever vigilant against spies, saboteurs, and fifth columnists, employs large amounts of Replikas dedicated to internal security, counter-intelligence, and surveillance.
